note: Assembled by hand from console output of bench-load.mjs (1k: 5/5 reps; 5k: 1/5 reps -- run deliberately stopped early, see report.md) and bench-drag.mjs (1k drag fps). The 10k tier never produced a completed rep -- observed >42 min wall-clock, killed without convergence (see report.md 'What we could not measure').
hardware: Apple Silicon dev box (see report.md for reference-hardware-profile disclosure)
fcoseParamsSource: cytoscape-fcose package defaults, see fcose-params.mjs provenance comment

5000.note: Single rep only, ~12.5 minutes wall clock. Additional reps stopped deliberately -- see report.md.

10000.note: No completed rep. Observed >42 minutes of continuous 100% CPU (verified via `ps` on the chrome-headless-shell renderer process, not stalled/deadlocked -- steadily consuming CPU) before the probe was deliberately killed. See report.md 'What we could not measure'.

drag1000.note: See raw-results-drag.json for full 296-sample array. p95 computed per the task brief's literal pseudocode (ascending sort, ceil(0.95n)-1 index) -- see report.md for why this reads misleadingly high given the sample distribution's bimodal jitter.
